name: Replace
description: Replaces occurrences of a substring with another string.
python_code:
from src.nodes.base import BaseNode

async def execute(self, inputs):
    text = inputs.get('text') or self.get_parameter('text', '')
    old = inputs.get('old') or self.get_parameter('old', '')
    new = inputs.get('new') or self.get_parameter('new', '')
    try:
        res = str(text).replace(str(old), str(new))
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_info(f'Replace error: {e}')
        res = str(text)

    await self.set_output('result', res)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'result': res}
